description_long: This is a modern sectional sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a right-side chaise lounge extension. The sofa is upholstered in a uniform, medium-gray fabric that appears soft and matte, with a smooth, unpatterned surface. It has three seat sections, each with a matching rectangular back cushion, and the chaise section is seamlessly integrated into the overall form. The armrest is present only on the left side, low and straight, matching the height of the backrest. The sofa is supported by six slender, black metal legs that are slightly angled and evenly spaced for stability. The overall silhouette is clean and geometric, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale outdoor patios.
description: A modern gray sectional sofa with a right-side chaise, low left armrest, and slim black metal legs. The design is minimalist with smooth, uniform upholstery and a clean, geometric silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full three-seat layout, right-side chaise, and left armrest.
description_view_1: Side view from the chaise end, highlighting the extended lounge and the sofa's slim profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the arrangement of the six supporting legs.
description_view_3: Side view from the armrest end, showing the low armrest and the sectional's depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, attached seat cushions and three matching rectangular back cushions, with a single extended chaise section; all cushions are visually integrated and not loose.
attribute_armrest_style: Single low, straight armrest on the left side, matching the backrest height, with a simple, unadorned profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, black metal legs, evenly spaced at the corners and under the central sections, with a slightly angled, exposed design for a modern look.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with three attached rectangular cushions, straight and uniform in height, with no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid medium-gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
